sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, value) VALUES (1, 'Testing'), (2, 'Boundary'), (3, 'Values'), (4, NULL), (5, 'SQL Fuzzing');
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE RIGHT(value, 2) BETWEEN 'ng' AND 'zz';
SELECT RIGHT(a.value, 3) AS rightmost, a.id FROM test_strings a WHERE RIGHT(a.value, 3) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.id, RIGHT(a.value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings) - 3) AS trimmed FROM test_strings a HAVING RIGHT(trimmed, 2) BETWEEN 'zz' AND 'zz' OR trimmed IS NULL;

SELECT a.id, RIGHT(a.value, 4) AS right_from_a, RIGHT(b.value, 2) AS right_from_b FROM test_strings a JOIN test_strings b ON RIGHT(a.value, 3) = RIGHT(b.value, 2) WHERE RIGHT(b.value, 2) BETWEEN 'in' AND 'ng';
SELECT id, RIGHT(value, 1) FROM test_strings WHERE RIGHT(value, 10) BETWEEN '' AND RIGHT('test', 2);
SELECT RIGHT(value, 0) AS result FROM test_strings WHERE id BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(id) FROM test_strings WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AND (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_strings) AND RIGHT(value, 2) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE numeric_test (num INT, str_value VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO numeric_test (num, str_value) VALUES (1, ''), (2, 'Edge'), (3, 'Values'), (4, NULL);
SELECT n.num, RIGHT((SELECT str_value FROM numeric_test m WHERE m.num = n.num), 2) AS right_string FROM numeric_test n WHERE n.num BETWEEN 1 AND 3;
SELECT A.id, RIGHT(A.value, B.max_len) AS right_value FROM test_strings A JOIN (SELECT MAX(LENGTH(value)) AS max_len FROM test_strings) B ON RIGHT(A.value, B.max_len) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE RIGHT(value, 1) BETWEEN 'A' AND 'z' HAVING COUNT(value) > 1;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, RIGHT(value, 5) AS right_value FROM test_strings WHERE RIGHT(value, 5) IS NOT NULL) tmp WHERE right_value BETWEEN 'Fuzz' AND 'ings';
